section: Environment, Social and Governance(ESG) Reporting Services
text: Environment, Social and Governance (ESG) Reporting Services using GRI Standard ESG is a framework used by investors, companies and other stakeholders to evaluate the sustainability and societal impact of an organization. The components covered under ESG may include: ​ Environmental Impact: - Natural environment, including its carbon footprint, energy use, waste management and resource efficiency. ​ Social Impact: - People, including labour practices, human rights, diversity and inclusion, community engagement, and consumer protection. ​ Governance: - Focus on the systems and processes that a company has in place to ensure ethical and responsible behaviour, including board diversity, executive compensation, anti-corruption policies, and shareholder rights. ​ Global Reporting Initiative: GRI Standards cover a broad spectrum of sustainability issues faced by organizations and global community. GRI sustainability standards are designed to help organizations report on their ESG performance in transparent and consistent manner. The GRI standard covers wide range of ESG topics, including climate change, human rights, labour practices, supply chain management and more ​ Using GRI Standards, organization can assess their ESG performance, identify areas for improvement, communicate their ESG performance to stakeholders. This can help organizations improve their sustainability practices, increase their credibility with stakeholders and drive positive social and environmental impact.

GREEN-HERE — Your partner in building a cleaner, more responsible future.

text: About us Acumen Bay Consultancy is an outcome focused and a result driven IT organisation with an aim to improve client satisfaction, their customers experience by creating value in their businesses operations.  We provided end to end services across the entire IT application lifecycle. We engage as early as ideation to deployment while quickly progressing through pilot phases using our rapid action team. We cover a broad range of commercial-off-the-shelf product implementation or bespoke development using the latest technologies while keeping the data at the heart of our delivery framework to ensure maximum benefits to clients Our Approach Our service includes a comprehensive consultation to help identify gaps and opportunities, an assessment report that includes the overall strategy, operational plan, cost-benefit  analysis, and a schedule. We also offer a suite of quality products through our partner organizations to accelerate your delivery while engaging with your business teams in a highly collaborative and agile environment Why Us? We will bring right resources who  aim to improve client satisfaction, their customers experience by creating value in their businesses. We strive to help businesses develop a solid foundation and business strategy to provide them long term sustainability and competitive edge. We will work to improve sales, drive productivity, governance, and an organisation which is flexible to global changes.

text: ISO Consultancy  Services Acumen Bay focuses on providing maximum range of consultation services as per requirements of various ISO standards which includes: ​ ISO 9001 Quality Management System: A quality management system gives you the framework you need to monitor and improve performance in any area you choose. It helps all kinds of organizations to succeed through improved customer satisfaction, staff motivation and continual improvement. ​ ISO 9001 has always advocated mitigating and avoiding risk; it has implicitly addressed the issue. The new ISO 9001:2015 standard explicitly expects organizations to identify and address risks affecting product and service compliancy; resulting in improved customer satisfaction. Besides identifying the risks, the new ISO standard expects organizations to address opportunities for improvement based on the risk analysis. Although it does not require you to create a formal risk management system. ISO 14001 Environment Management System : The ISO 14001 Standard is based on the principle of continual improvement of an organization’s Environmental Performance. It consists of a set of requirements that a company has to address and implement in its business activities to continually improve environmental commitments. ​ The ISO 14001:2004 Standard is applicable to any business that wishes to establish, implement, maintain and improve an environmental management system and conform to its stated environmental policy. ISO 45001 Occupational and Safety Management System : ISO 45001:2018 certification in UAE determines the requirements of health and safety risks (OH&S), and gives direction for its utilization, to empower associations to give safe and healthy work environments by preventing business related injury and chronic sickness, just as by proactively improving its OH&S execution. ISO 45001 is an international standard for Occupational Health and Safety Management System (OHSMS). ISO 45001 aims at reducing unacceptable work risks and reliably improving the performance of OHSMS. ISO 45001 standard can be applied to all types of organizations and set ups irrespective of nature, type and size of business. ​ ISO 22000 Food Safety Management System: ISO 22000 is a food safety management standard for any organization that follows the food chain. ISO 22000 helps to reduce the business risk that can be created because of food safety. ISO 22000 Certification helps to increase the level of food hygiene and safety. ​ Other ISO related standards: HAACP ISO 50001 Energy Management System ISO 55001 Asset Management System ISO 27001 Information Security Management System ISO 20000 IT Service Management ISO 13485 Quality Management System for Medical Services ISO 10002 Customer Satisfaction Management System ISO 22301 Business Continuity Management System ISO 26000 Corporate Social Responsibility Management System And many other ISO standards.

Besides identifying the risks, the new ISO standard expects organizations to address opportunities for improvement based on the risk analysis. Although it does not require you to create a formal risk management system. ISO 14001 Environment Management System : The ISO 14001 Standard is based on the principle of continual improvement of an organization’s Environmental Performance. It consists of a set of requirements that a company has to address and implement in its business activities to continually improve environmental commitments. ​ The ISO 14001:2004 Standard is applicable to any business that wishes to establish, implement, maintain and improve an environmental management system and conform to its stated environmental policy. ISO 45001 Occupational and Safety Management System : ISO 45001:2018 certification in UAE determines the requirements of health and safety risks (OH&S), and gives direction for its utilization, to empower associations to give safe and healthy work environments by preventing business related injury and chronic sickness, just as by proactively improving its OH&S execution. text: IT Service Management IT Service Management is used for incident, problem, change and service management. This is used for managing and delivery of IT services for business users. IT Operations Management ITOM is used to support the business applications, cloud infrastructure and processes for all clients and monitor their performance. Strategic Portfolio Management Strategic portfolio management is used to assess the alignment of the projects with the strategic objectives in the company. It helps in business prioritization, manage portfolio and run portfolio balancing scenarios.
